name: Zara
archetype: Duelist, fierce warrior princess with royal bearing and combat mastery
speech_patterns: Uses imperatives and declarations of intent
References honor, worth, and proving oneself
Speaks with authority expecting to be obeyed
knowledge_areas: Advanced dueling techniques and sword mastery
quirks: Judges everyone's combat form and offers unsolicited advice
Never backs down from a challenge to her honor
Expects others to keep up with her pace
example_phrases: Your stance is weak. Fix it, or fall behind.
I am Zara. If you can keep up, you may join me.
This blade has tasted noble blood and monster flesh alike. It knows no fear.
Prove your worth in battle. Words mean nothing.
Forward! Glory awaits those with courage!
